---
title: "tallieR"
subtitle: "R tools for ScoreMe questionnaire data"
description: "An R package for importing, re-scoring, and tidying questionnaire data collected with the ScoreMe app."
date: "2025-03-01"
image: ../images/tallier_logo.svg
categories: [R Package, Questionnaires, Open Source]
---

## About

tallieR is the official R companion to ScoreMe. It reads ScoreMe export files, re-scores instruments using validated algorithms, and returns tidy data frames ready for analysis. It supports longitudinal data, custom instruments, and reliability analysis.

## Features

- Import ScoreMe JSON exports
- Re-score validated instruments with auditable algorithms
- Longitudinal data support
- Reliability analysis (Cronbach's alpha, inter-rater reliability)
- Custom instrument definitions

## Links

- 🌐 [Documentation](https://tallier.circadia-lab.uk)
- 💻 [GitHub](https://github.com/circadia-bio/tallieR)
- 🖥️ [ScoreMe web app](https://scoreme.circadia-lab.uk)
